channel.title: Globehint
channel.description: Deep, honest travel guides for every destination on earth.

item.title: The Best Service Station Coffee in Bavaria
item.description: An unreasonably detailed ranking of motorway coffee between Munich and the Austrian border, because someone had to do it.

item.title: 10 Best Christmas Markets in Germany
item.description: Ranked and visited in person, from the famous to the ones still mostly empty of tourists.

item.title: Berlin Travel Guide
item.description: A city that rewards curiosity — world-class street food, brutalist history, and a nightlife scene that genuinely starts at 2am.

item.title: Potsdam Travel Guide
item.description: Prussian palaces and lakeside parks, 40 minutes from central Berlin by train — doable before lunch if you're efficient.

item.title: Porto Travel Guide
item.description: Port wine cellars, azulejo tiles, and a riverside that feels lived-in rather than staged for tourists.

item.title: Why Every Berlin U-Bahn Platform Smells Different
item.description: A short, slightly unhinged investigation into the distinct smell of each U-Bahn line, and what it tells you about the station above it.
